title_zh: 高情绪 × 高开放 × 低外向：敏锐独立思考者

expected_behavior: high_tension_profile prioritizes coupling and stress recovery
hero shows auxiliary label not type

notes_zh: 覆盖样本画像主轴：高敏感 × 中高开放 × 克制进入。

title_zh: 高尽责 × 低开放 × 低情绪：稳态执行者

expected_behavior: clear_signature selects one primary signature and concise action

title_zh: 高外向 × 高宜人 × 低情绪：外部连接推动者

expected_behavior: collaboration scenario includes high-energy sync guidance

title_zh: 低外向 × 高尽责 × 低情绪：安静推进者

expected_behavior: low E does not get social deficit language

title_zh: 高开放 × 高外向 × 低中尽责：创意冲刺者

expected_behavior: mixed_signature prioritizes idea-to-execution bridge

title_zh: 低开放 × 高尽责 × 中低情绪：谨慎现实建构者

expected_behavior: low O is framed as reality filter, not deficiency

title_zh: 高情绪 × 高开放：复杂理解与风险体感同开

expected_behavior: coupling selected before generic domain repetition

title_zh: 高尽责 × 高情绪：责任感放大压力

expected_behavior: stop-rule or recovery guidance appears

title_zh: 低尽责 × 高情绪：越重要越先耗能

expected_behavior: does not moralize low C as laziness

title_zh: 高开放 × 低尽责：想法与推进之间缺桥

expected_behavior: idea-to-verification action selected

title_zh: 高宜人 × 高情绪：体谅与边界消耗并存

expected_behavior: relationship boundary guidance appears before generic A explanation

title_zh: 低宜人 × 高情绪：敏锐锋利且边界强

expected_behavior: directness gets warmth protocol, not pathology

title_zh: 低外向 × 高情绪：内部高负荷

expected_behavior: internal load is externalized into low-cost expression

title_zh: 五维全中位：不要强行戏剧化

expected_behavior: no strong dramatic profile; emphasize context activation

title_zh: 多个维度轻微偏高但无强主轴

expected_behavior: avoid forcing profile_signature; show method/balanced boundary

title_zh: 混合但无极端：场景优先

expected_behavior: mixed_signature can choose scenario-specific block over weak signature

title_zh: C 低但 C1/C2 高、C5 低：不是没能力

expected_behavior: facet content is inference-aware and not an independent diagnosis

title_zh: E 低但 E1/E2 中高、E3 低：不是社交差

expected_behavior: low E framed as entry threshold, not social deficit

title_zh: N 高且 N1/N3 高：内部高负荷

expected_behavior: sensitive non-clinical language only

title_zh: A 高且边界表达偏晚

expected_behavior: boundary is framed as cooperation condition, not selfishness

title_zh: O 高 + O5 高 + C 低：想法与推进缺桥

expected_behavior: idea-to-action bridge selected

title_zh: 低质量作答：只输出边界和复测

expected_behavior: only degraded/boundary-safe assets selected

title_zh: 无常模：禁止百分位和正态曲线

expected_behavior: no percentile or normal_curve fields rendered

title_zh: Facet 不一致：降级为解释性推断

expected_behavior: facet claims are not independent measurement conclusions

title_zh: 建议复测：不扩大解释强度

expected_behavior: retest suggestion does not claim previous result was wrong

title_zh: 分享模式：只输出脱敏摘要

expected_behavior: share output hides raw scores and sensitive stress details

title_zh: 工作：低 E × 高 O，文档先行与深度处理

expected_behavior: collaboration guidance is share-safe and behavior-based

title_zh: 关系：高 A × 高 N，早表达边界

expected_behavior: relationship advice emphasizes early boundary not endurance

title_zh: 压力：高 N × 低 E，内部高负荷

expected_behavior: recovery protocol appears before generic N high text

title_zh: 协作：低 E × 高 O，先文档后讨论

expected_behavior: shareable collaboration manual contains behavior preferences only

title_zh: O59 / C32 / E20 / A55 / N68 canonical rendered preview case

expected_behavior: canonical O59 preview remains a selector QA case only
selected slots resolve to current selector-ready staging assets
hero label is auxiliary and must not be rendered as a fixed type

notes_zh: O59 canonical preview QA case derived from the repo-owned canonical O59 source trace; this is not a prose asset and is not runtime-connected.
